rag_rules: Fix unresolved references like 'Task1' before adding AGREE clauses to avoid type errors
Only place guarantee statements in component types, not implementations
generic_rules: Validate AGREE syntax before applying repairs to prevent cascading errors
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible or properly declared in the same annex
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside annex agree blocks; use component types for assumptions/guarantees
Guarantee and assume statements are restricted to component type scopes
anti_patterns: Adding AGREE clauses without resolving prior reference errors can cause further validation failures
Placing guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
